textPlain: Regardless of the appeal to unix philosophy in their docs, sd has never stuck with me because it doesn't natively support replace across a project/ multiple files, and that's what you always want to do. Instead I pipe `rg -R --json` output into a script (rg does do replacement, but only on the stdout, not in-place)
If you use fish, have a look at `string replace` as a built-in and related [0].[0]: https://fishshell.com/docs/current/cmds/string.html
